Name: [The Roots]
Description: The lower maintenance levels of Aethelgard, where 800 years of decay have transformed functional infrastructure into rusted, claustrophobic passages. Geothermal pumping stations hiss with escaping steam. Condensation drips from corroded pipes. The air tastes of ozone and rust.

Details: Runic glyphs flicker weakly on the walls, their light stuttering
A massive crack runs along the eastern wall, exposing conduits beneath
Condensation drips steadily from corroded pipes overhead
Pools of iridescent sludge collect in the low points of the floor
The ceiling sags under centuries of accumulated stress
Fragments of shattered Data-Slates litter the debris
Ancient warning symbols are barely visible through layers of rust
Emergency lighting strips provide dim, flickering illumination
The walls are scarred by blast marks from a long-forgotten conflict
Graffiti in Old Aetheric script marks this as a worker's route
Sounds: hissing steam escaping from fractured pipes
dripping water echoing in the distance
